runtimeConstitution.coreRule: Collection is context. Drawer is reading. Homepage is discovery.
forbidden: turn collections into standalone CMS pages
replace mixed-object homepage with collection grids
put card walls inside reader drawers
make topic collections prerender into static collection pages

serverStorageBoundary.hotLayerRule: Keep runtime, databases, Syncthing hot mirror, Astro dist, Pagefind, OpenList DB and /srv/myblog on the server local filesystem.
serverStorageBoundary.coldLayerRule: OpenList/COS/Quark are public access, blob backend, cold archive and content address space only; they are not an ext4/system disk replacement.

canonicalStructuredContentPlatform.sourceRule: Obsidian/Vault remains Markdown file truth; DataBase owns structured identity, blocks, assets and relations.
canonicalStructuredContentPlatform.myblogRole: projection client and public rendering shell only
forbidden: direct DataBase MySQL access from MyBlog canonical content projection
silent fallback when DataBase projection is enabled

fileTruth: Windows Vault synced to Linux hot mirror and exposed through OpenList

serverStorageBoundary.hotLayerRule: Keep runtime, databases, Syncthing hot mirror, Astro dist, Pagefind, OpenList DB and /srv/myblog on the server local filesystem.
serverStorageBoundary.coldLayerRule: OpenList/COS/Quark are public access, blob backend, cold archive and content address space only; they are not an ext4/system disk replacement.

sourceOfTruthMap.fileTruth: Windows Vault synced to Linux hot mirror and exposed through OpenList
sourceOfTruthMap.objectStorageTruth: Tencent COS bucket myblog-media-1410041307 mounted in OpenList at /腾讯云COS

remoteIde.sshOutageRule: Do not promote a local checkout to canonical when SSH is unavailable; use GitHub as a delivery surface and reconcile the server source root after recovery.

runtimeDatabase.integrationRole: dynamic runtime state layer beside OpenList/COS/Quark file storage and Obsidian content truth

plaintextPersonalSecretStore.purpose: store personal account/password/API-key style information directly in MySQL as readable text
plaintextPersonalSecretStore.warning: Values are intentionally stored as plaintext in MySQL; do not commit real values to Git or logs.

stabilizationSprint.thesis: Stabilize the base before activating more runtimes. AppFlowy, Immich, Directus and Meilisearch remain target/skeleton services until file truth, MarkdownObject schema and Quartz runtime layer are stable.
priorityOrder: Syncthing or Obsidian Sync of complete vault into Linux:/home/vault/Obsidian hot mirror
Linux Vault hot mirror layout stability: /home/vault/Obsidian/docs, /home/vault/Obsidian/image, .obsidian and attachments
tools/build-runtime-content-index.mjs refactor as the CMS kernel
Quartz 4 / Flowershow runtime layer evaluation for wikilink, backlink, graph, callout and semantic markdown
AppFlowy collaboration runtime evaluation after the above are stable
stabilizationSprint.glueOnlyRule: MyBlog only writes glue, projection, and runtime contracts; it does not reimplement sync, markdown compiler, graph engine, search engine, media runtime, or CMS backends.
forbidden: start AppFlowy Cloud containers during this sprint
start Immich, Directus or Meilisearch during this sprint
add new pages, overlays, feeds, graphs or AI runtimes
continue expanding Project Workbench into a bespoke collaboration suite
claim a target/skeleton service is active before readiness gate and source alignment

contentInfrastructureReduction.thesis: MyBlog has crossed from blog code into content infrastructure. Do not expand bespoke runtime JSON, giant runtime JSON, watcher, RSS, projection, search or deploy glue when mature substrates can own those jobs.

activeNow.articleProjection: Runtime MarkdownObject index at public-data/runtime/content-index.json and /srv/myblog/site/runtime/content-index.json
activeNow.search: Pagefind static archive search plus runtime feed filtering; not unified full-site dynamic search
activeNow.storage: Linux hot mirror plus OpenList/COS/Quark cold/blob/public browse boundary
activeNow.openListBoundary: OpenList exposes /Obsidian and cold/blob mounts; it does not own runtime build, projection, search, database, Pagefind, Astro dist, Syncthing hot mirror or node_modules

quartz.role: Obsidian digital garden substrate for Markdown pipeline, wikilinks, backlinks, graph, RSS, search and content index ideas

contentlayer.role: Astro-native typed content schema, parsing, watch and projection replacement candidate

meilisearch.role: dynamic object, OpenList file, metadata and semantic search runtime

coolify.role: deployment platform candidate for Git deploy, env, healthcheck, rollback, cron and compose

forbidden: grow content-index.json into a database or search engine
add new bespoke watcher, RSS race workaround, build sync, deploy wrapper or projection governance layer before evaluating Quartz/Contentlayer/Meilisearch/Coolify
claim Quartz, Contentlayer, Meilisearch or Coolify are active before integration or service readiness evidence
let OpenList participate in runtime build, projection authority or hot storage

workspaceFederation.thesis: Multiple workspaces are allowed, but authority is capability-based and machine-checked before deployment.
rules: workspace existence is not authority
deploys must run through npm run deploy:site or at least tools/deploy-guard.mjs
do not hand-run scp to /srv/myblog/site from an unchecked workspace
.codex-runtime worktrees are experimental by default and cannot deploy
production promotion means moving changes back into a workspace with the required capability

contentPipeline.status: Runtime MarkdownObject projection active; Syncthing syncs the complete Windows E:\Vaults\Obsidian vault to Linux /home/vault/Obsidian, OpenList exposes public content at /openlist/Obsidian, and Windows watcher/scp content sync is disabled

contentSourceBase.rule: Vault decides files; Runtime MarkdownObject projection decides public article objects; current tags/categories are filesystem/frontmatter/wikilink derived taxonomy, not AI semantic ontology; KnowledgeCollection buffers objects as Reading Sessions before homepage surfaces; frontend cards only read generated card metadata

folders.verification: idle on both peers; needBytes=0; create/modify/delete acceptance passed

forbidden: MyBlog one-off image upload as vault sync
storing WebDAV credentials in source, README, logs or frontend bundle

contentPipeline.gitMirror: content-vault working copy target; path not created as active source yet
contentPipeline.cmsRule: choose one CMS in P1; CMS edits must commit/write back to the vault working copy, not to MySQL or dist

commands.deprecatedWindowsSync: removed from package scripts; old tools/watch-obsidian-home-sync.mjs and tools/sync-runtime-content-index.mjs must not be used

pipeline: OpenList /openlist/Obsidian content control plane and public identity

taxonomyMode.rule: Do not describe current tags/categories as AI semantic tagging, ontology, embeddings, clusters or knowledge graph truth.

semanticPipeline.lastProviderCheck: 2026-05-08 cloud sub2api coze-glm-shell key generated one valid sidecar and runtime projection read it as semantic.status=active
semanticPipeline.writePolicy: semantic pipeline may write sidecar projection only; it must never rewrite Markdown body or frontmatter and must never override explicit tags/categories

schema.kindDerivation: frontmatter.kind, then docs folder mapping: blog/post, notes/note, papers or 论文/paper, projects/project, books/book-note, codex/codex
schema.visibilityDerivation: frontmatter.visibility/private/draft plus private and drafts path guards
schema.relations: wikilinks, backlinks and assets normalized during content-index compile
schema.card: card.eyebrow, card.chips and card.subtitle are generated by the index compiler from categories, tags, project and series

collectionSchema.generation: tools/build-runtime-content-index.mjs groups MarkdownObject into folder collections, frontmatter series collections and shared topic collections
collectionSchema.surfaceRule: homepage is a mixed-object runtime surface and may include folder/series KnowledgeCollection lens cards without becoming collection-first or collection-only; a collection card only opens a Reading Session drawer; /collections/ lists folder/series collection entry points; /collections/[slug]/ is only generated for folder/series Reading Session surfaces with article reader plus collection TOC; topic collections remain metadata/search/Graph dimensions in the runtime index and must not be batch prerendered into static collection pages; object switching inside a collection must not full reload or degrade into an object card grid

filter: default include all Markdown under /home/vault/Obsidian/docs unless blocked by draft/private rules
runtimeProjection.homepageFeedUi: Homepage is Runtime Surface v2: mixed-object masonry, feed tabs, drawer peek, search, OpenList/Pinterest shell and runtime refresh stay alive together. It may insert a small number of KnowledgeCollection lens cards, but must not become a Collection Gateway or collection-only feed. Collection drawer templates are Reading Sessions where current article html is the reading center and collection TOC is the context rail. Clicking another object swaps drawer article content from /runtime/articles/*.json without page navigation. /posts/ remains the article index and /posts/[slug]/ remains the permalink detail route. /runtime/events SSE is preferred and 30 second polling is only used when EventSource is unavailable
runtimeProjection.runtimeReaderUi: /posts/[slug]/ is the only public article detail route. It is generated from Runtime MarkdownObject metadata and reads the matching /runtime/articles/*.json detail payload for body/html/toc.
runtimeProjection.cardUiRule: ArticleCard, homepage runtime feed, /posts/ and /posts/[slug]/ display chips only from MarkdownObject.card.chips; tags/categories remain indexing metadata, not ad hoc card labels
runtimeProjection.autoSyncWatcher: deprecated: Windows watcher/scp content sync is disabled
runtimeProjection.serverRuntimeProjector: tools/server-runtime-content-projector.mjs runs as systemd myblog-runtime-content-projector.service on Linux, watches and scans /home/vault/Obsidian/docs, writes /srv/myblog/site/runtime/content-index.json with /openlist/Obsidian/docs public identity, and never runs Astro build/Pagefind/deploy/scp
runtimeProjection.runtimeEvents: tools/runtime-content-sse-server.mjs runs as systemd myblog-runtime-sse.service on 127.0.0.1:4121; nginx proxies /runtime/events; it only emits content-index events when the live JSON file changes
runtimeProjection.syncOnlyRule: Obsidian markdown edits sync as files into /home/vault/Obsidian; Linux projection updates only /srv/myblog/site/runtime/content-index.json and OpenList identity fields. Astro build, Pagefind, scp and deploy are reserved for shell code, route or static asset changes
runtimeProjection.postsPageUi: Runtime MarkdownObject articles are the only /posts/ listing source
runtimeProjection.metadataUi: Editorial metadata line; no badge/chip controls on runtime article metadata

forbidden: treat Obsidian Vault as public site source
treat MySQL as article body source
run TinaCMS and Decap CMS as parallel editors
edit apps/web/dist or /srv/myblog/site as content source

composableServiceStack.status: target architecture documented; OpenList+COS is active, Immich skeleton is installed but not started, Directus and Meilisearch are not deployed
composableServiceStack.thesis: MyBlog is the presentation shell; mature services own files, AI media management, metadata curation and search

presentationShell.role: Feed, Drawer, Reader, Visual Collections, Graph and public routes; consumes APIs, snapshots, manifests and Astro content collections

fileTruth.role: large original files, books, visuals, videos and archives

mediaRuntime.role: photo/video ingest, thumbnails, EXIF, face/object recognition, CLIP embeddings and semantic search

metadataOverlay.role: metadata layer for books, visuals, collections and knowledge_objects; P0 books metadata is a versioned sidecar until Directus or an equivalent metadata DB is deployed
metadataOverlay.filePolicy: stores structured metadata only; large files remain in OpenList/COS

searchRuntime.role: dynamic full-text and semantic search for KnowledgeObject snapshots, OpenList file index, Directus metadata and Immich imports
searchRuntime.currentFallback: Pagefind remains the current static search until Meilisearch is deployed

infraSkeleton.serverSkeletonStatus: synced to server; .env is intentionally missing and containers are not started
infraSkeleton.startupGate: run ./check-readiness.sh and require ready before docker compose up -d
infraSkeleton.status: source skeleton only; not deployed as running services

authorityRules: OpenList/COS owns file existence only; it does not own tags, descriptions, status or collections
public-data/books/books-index.json is a regenerable file index projection, not an editable metadata database
public-data/books/books.metadata.json is the current P0 editable metadata layer and must migrate to Directus or an equivalent metadata DB before scaling
browser localStorage is preference/cache/legacy migration only, never runtime truth
apps/admin-next is a gateway/import/cache/runtime bridge, not a full CMS, media library or search engine
visitor page loads must read snapshots and caches, not run AI inference or re-index large files
do not describe Directus or Meilisearch as active before deployment and verification

projectionClients.status: target architecture documented; PWA/TWA first, native Android only after Runtime API schema stabilizes
projectionClients.thesis: One Runtime and Object Graph, multiple projection surfaces. Web and Android may have different UI, but must not duplicate authority or business logic.
runtimeAuthority: OpenList/COS blob backend and content access

pwaTwa.stack: PWA manifest + service worker + Bubblewrap / Trusted Web Activity
pwaTwa.role: installable Android shell that follows Web Runtime updates
serviceWorkerBoundary: do not intercept HTTP Range requests
pwaTwa.artifactRule: generated-only; do not commit Bubblewrap output

androidNative.stack: Kotlin + Compose + ViewModel/Flow + Ktor/Retrofit + Coil + Room
androidNative.role: native runtime client consuming the same Runtime API

forbidden: WebView shell as final app architecture
duplicating book existence logic in Android
duplicating OpenList parsing or metadata authority in Android
duplicating search ranking or graph relation logic per client
treating Room/local cache as source of truth
projectionClients.localCacheRule: Android Room/cache may mirror runtime data for offline and speed, but must use version/etag/modified/size/sync watermark invalidation and never become upstream truth
projectionClients.updateTarget: GitHub Releases + AppUpdater first; F-Droid repo is optional later

runtimeFederation.status: architecture contract documented; only OpenList/COS and MyBlog runtime pieces are active unless separately marked
runtimeFederation.thesis: Clone mature system roles, not UI or duplicate engines. MyBlog owns Object Layer Glue, Runtime Schema, Projection Logic and Knowledge Semantics.
targetPipeline: MyBlog Runtime API and Object Layer Glue
Astro UI Shell / PWA-TWA / Android / Search / CLI / AI Agent

matureReplacementPriority.replace: Windows watcher, scp content sync, Obsidian in-process projection and custom Vault sync
parallel article systems, Astro posts authority, ad-hoc runtime article projections and browser-side markdown rendering
custom Markdown compiler, wikilink/backlink/graph basics, TOC, LaTeX, callout and table rendering
runtime object search gaps left by Pagefind/local search
custom visual snapshot, thumbnail manifest, AI tagging, embedding and gallery runtime
custom object/media admin and metadata relation editor
custom Project Studio collaboration runtime, block editor, kanban/database, comments, realtime presence and workspace permissions

activeOpenListMounts.role: public content access and OpenList identity for the Linux hot mirror
large original files, media, books and archive backend

serverStorageIntegration.lastAction: 2026-05-08 pruned re-generable /srv/myblog/public-data/openlist-files cache, reducing root disk from 94% used to 91% used
rules: OpenList is not an ext4/system disk replacement
do not place databases, node_modules, Astro dist, Pagefind, Syncthing hot mirror or /srv/myblog runtime roots on OpenList mounts
OpenList file cache is re-generable and may be pruned under explicit apply mode
legacy-disabled Vault folders are manual cold-archive candidates, not automatic deletion targets

appflowy.currentMyBlogIntegration: apps/web/src/pages/projects/[slug].astro exposes an AppFlowy target panel and falls back to GitHub Workbench until appflowyUrl is configured per project.
appflowy.authorityBoundary: AppFlowy owns collaborative editing, realtime workspace, block documents, kanban/database and comments after deployment. MyBlog owns only public projection, feed/graph references and GitHub signal fallback.

project.tengokukk.com DNS does not currently resolve to 124.220.233.126
server /srv/myblog/services/appflowy-cloud has about 6GB free, below the 40GB AppFlowy readiness gate
server .env currently contains placeholder values only
project content entries do not yet have production appflowyUrl values
no AppFlowy snapshot importer/API contract exists yet

doNotBuild: Markdown compiler or Digital Garden base
rules: clone roles, not UI
reuse Quartz or Flowershow style garden substrate before inventing Markdown, backlink, graph or publish basics
replace custom runtime with mature layers before adding new runtime abstraction
files are carriers and objects are identity
MyBlog writes glue, not engines
Android is a runtime projection, not a second app universe
every federation member must declare authority, status, integration path, secret boundary and failure mode

runtimeDatabase.integrationRole: dynamic runtime state layer beside OpenList/COS/Quark file storage and Obsidian content truth

plaintextPersonalSecretStore.purpose: store personal account/password/API-key style information directly in MySQL as readable text
plaintextPersonalSecretStore.warning: Values are intentionally stored as plaintext in MySQL; do not commit real values to Git or logs.

projectCollaborationRuntime.status: reduction-mode; AppFlowy is target-not-deployed and GitHub Workbench is interim-active fallback
projectCollaborationRuntime.principle: Do not keep growing a full collaboration system inside the blog runtime.
myBlogResponsibilities: Project Studio entry and public projection shell
forbidden: claim AppFlowy is active before project.tengokukk.com is deployed and appflowyUrl is configured
continue adding custom wiki/timeline/kanban/comments as the primary collaboration runtime
read secrets or tokens from the browser
scrape AppFlowy iframe DOM for data

frontendRuntimeAudit.method: trace user behavior through DOM, event, state, render, hydration, network, animation, authority and fallback
frontendRuntimeAudit.rule: frontend runtime changes must update the relevant Architecture Codex entry in apps/web/src/data/architectureCodex.ts or explicitly state why the audit map is unaffected

frontendRuntimeConvergence.status: reduction mode; legacy inline runtime and React islands remain current overlay/drawer authority
frontendRuntimeConvergence.thesis: MyBlog must converge command, keyboard, overlays, drawers, focus, navigation and client cache behavior into one frontend runtime kernel before adding more independent runtime layers.
currentRisk: Ctrl/Cmd+K split authority between HomeCommandPalette and fallback search
custom window events as integration layer
p1Implemented: home inline Ctrl/Cmd+K fallback only runs before command palette ready marker exists
HomeCommandPalette dispatches runtime:command kind search.open before legacy home-search-open bridge
home command and fallback search layers use runtime experience depth/surface/elevation/motion tokens
rules: migrate one interaction owner at a time
state current owner, target owner and fallback owner for runtime changes
do not add global listeners without updating audit and convergence docs
do not add custom events without typed runtime-kernel commands/events
do not introduce localStorage as new source of truth
installed runtime libraries only become active owners after a concrete migrated surface and browser evidence

runtimeExperienceLayer.status: P1 command/search surfaces use runtime tokens; broader surfaces still pending
runtimeExperienceLayer.thesis: MyBlog needs interaction quality and runtime coherence across surfaces, not more isolated components.
p1Implemented: home command layer uses runtime depth/surface/elevation tokens
fallback knowledge search layer uses runtime overlay depth/backdrop/elevation/motion tokens
Command/Search owner convergence is tracked in frontendRuntimeConvergence
rules: do not add isolated visual effects that are not tied to a runtime surface
do not import generic glowing particles, orbs, bokeh or marketing hero effects
new z-index values must use or extend the runtime depth scale
new motion timings must use or extend the runtime motion scale
new overlays must use Runtime Kernel ownership
new component libraries require a named migrated surface and browser evidence

visualCollectionSystem.status: P0 collection model implemented; Pinterest/Pixiv are bookmark-sync sources, Pinterest runtime mirror is backed by MySQL visual_pins
visualCollectionSystem.compatibilityProjection: visualItems is derived from visualCollections.flatMap(collection => collection.images)
visualCollectionSystem.secretPolicy: never write Pinterest/Pixiv passwords, cookies, session storage, local storage auth blobs or tokens into JSON/docs/logs/source
visualCollectionSystem.sourcePolicy: Pinterest/Pixiv/OpenList are bookmark or mirror sources, not frontend live reads; current sync records source links and platform preview URLs without downloading originals

runtimeMirror.secretPolicy: provider tokens stay in server env or provider secret store, never in source json or README

mediaRuntime.status: server skeleton installed; service not started because DNS and dedicated storage are not ready
mediaRuntime.deploymentMode: independent Docker Compose service behind its own root subdomain
mediaRuntime.subpathPolicy: do not serve Immich from /immich or /openlist; use photos.blog.tengokukk.com root
mediaRuntime.storagePolicy: do not place Immich uploads, thumbnails, database or ML cache on the current nearly-full root filesystem
blockedBy: /srv/immich has about 7GB free, below the 30GB startup gate
dedicated media storage volume not attached or configured
forbidden: train custom image tagging model before using Immich
iframe a subpath deployment as the primary integration
trigger AI inference during visitor page load

futurePipeline: optional thumbnail mirror after explicit approval

nginxStaticRouteRule: Astro static site only: location / must use try_files $uri $uri/index.html =404; unknown routes must not fall back to /index.html.
publishChecklist: visible verification when user-facing behavior changed
push branch and update PR before deploy
forbiddenActions: treat old working copies or static snapshots as active source
treat server runtime directories as long-term source of truth
declare analytics or tracing as active without verification
write local preview URLs as canonical public entry
deploy GitHub Pages artifact over /srv/myblog/site before production source integration
treat GitHub main as production-complete without checking /srv/myblog/repo

breakpoints.max1240: home-feed-grid changes from 3 columns to 2 columns
breakpoints.max900: home shell becomes block, page-level scrolling returns, feed grid becomes 1 column
breakpoints.max760: article drawer becomes full viewport width and toc becomes non-sticky

heritageTheme.intent: Cultural OS visual language: paper background, pure color panels, semantic color strips, low shadow, no glass blur
rules: future homepage visual changes target heritage by default
avoid large gradients, glow, glass blur, neon colors and large SaaS rounded cards
use semantic left borders for feed card type identity
full page links remain in drawer actions; main homepage click behavior remains drawer

visualSettings.persistence: localStorage only; not a server-side CMS setting

objectStorage.role: large original files and archives; not a database disk and not a direct replacement for Immich/Postgres local volumes

openList.frontendSecretPolicy: do not store OpenList tokens or netdisk cookies in static frontend source

githubVisualizationAssets.status: implemented as Visualization layer; homepage surfaces mini Feed chart cards and /github renders full dashboard
currentHomepageMapping: GitHub repo feed cards use overview.repos
GitHub mini heatmap/line/language cards use analytics.ts derived data
left rail GitHub card uses overview.profile and overview.totalContributions

showcaseLayer.status: implemented as lightweight data plus Astro showcase components
homepageMapping: homepage rail only shows bookshelf/music summaries

knowledgeLayer.status: implemented v1 as static Astro plus browser-local reader memory

principles.bookmarkObject: physical metaphor for feed item type
principles.readerDrawer: temporary book page, not a generic side panel

rules: bookmark extends from top of feed card
clip-path creates paper bookmark notch
post=purple, project/github=green, note/book=red, music=gold
card title color follows bookmark semantic color

highlightAnchorContract.status: types and anchor utilities implemented; homepage v1 currently restores by exact text and must migrate to anchors.ts in P1

searchContract.dependencyPolicy: no external search dependency in v1; future FlexSearch must preserve KnowledgeSearchDoc shape

graphContract.layout: radial levels: self, collections, content, tags/highlights
graphContract.dependencyPolicy: no force graph dependency in v1; future graph libraries must preserve KnowledgeGraphNode/KnowledgeGraphLink semantics

mustKeep: feed scroll position must not reset on filter or drawer close

detailPages.codeBlockRule: pre may scroll horizontally; it must not widen page-wrap

searchAndTaxonomy.rule: use page-wrap width; do not add fixed-width sidebars

publicEvidenceLibrary.longTextRule: evidence-library__mono and source code must use overflow-wrap:anywhere

overlapRules: console-main is the only admin main scroll container
chat-shell must keep min-height:0 so chat-thread can scroll
long paths use meta-grid code overflow-wrap:anywhere
home-feed-main is the only homepage main scroll container
do not reset home-feed-main scrollTop on filter/list/drawer selection
all grid children that contain text must keep min-width: 0
long text/path/code surfaces must use overflow-wrap:anywhere or line-clamp
article toc sticky behavior must stay inside home-article-drawer
admin wide tables/logs must not create console-main horizontal overflow
fix overlap through grid constraints and wrapping, not z-index layering

implementation.drawer: astro-rendered hidden reader nodes cloned by vanilla js

hardRules: do not restore module-stacked homepage as the primary home experience
all homepage feed cards and rail summary actions open drawer without navigation
drawer close restores home-feed-main scrollTop before returning focus
full detail pages remain canonical share and seo routes
bilibili link must be configured in apps/web/src/lib/profile.ts before claiming a real profile

P1: publish state machine wired to real api

markdownRenderingSystem.rule: Quartz is a Markdown rendering reference only; MyBlog keeps its Astro presentation shell and shared prose system.

runtimeDatabase.integrationRole: dynamic runtime state layer beside OpenList/COS/Quark file storage and Obsidian content truth
